summary.intent: Reorganize the SessionDetail screen layout so the file tree and session dialog appear side-by-side, with the session dialog right-aligned.
summary.outcome: Achieved a layout where intent text spans full width at the top, with the file tree (flex, left) and open items panel (fixed 340px, right) side-by-side below it.

repo: SessionDetail.tsx contains a CommitFileTree component and a session summary dialog with intent + open items sections.
The layout uses a max-width 860px container for the event timeline below the top section.
When no commit diff is present (checkpoint not yet mapped to a git OID), the summary dialog falls back to full width.

code.finding: Final layout: intent text block full-width with bottom border, then a flex row with CommitFileTree (flex:1) and open items panel (fixed 340px) side-by-side.

workflow: Type-checking the frontend after each layout change caught issues before testing in the UI.
Screenshots are critical for layout tasks — the first attempt misread the desired arrangement without visual confirmation.

friction: First layout attempt placed CommitFileTree taking 2/3 of the screen width alongside the open items, which was incorrect — the user had to clarify with a screenshot.
The user's initial instruction ('file tree next to the session dialog, dialog right-aligned') was ambiguous about the vertical stacking of intent text vs. file tree.
open_items: The transcript notes prisma/schema.prisma as a modified file, which appears unrelated to the UI layout changes — may warrant review.
The fallback behavior when no commit diff exists (full-width open items panel) should be verified visually.
